mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obMoveObManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectOutboundDetailListByContainer - 출고상세 조회 BY 이고 용기 */ SELECT OBDT.CTKEY ,OBDT.OWKEY ,OBDT.OBHDKEY ,MC.CNTRBARCODE ,OBDT.OBDTKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OBHD INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OBDT /*출고 상세 정보*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = OBDT.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = OBDT.OWKEY AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = OBDT.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_MVOB_CNTR_DT MCDT /*이고 용기 상세 정보*/ ON OBDT.CTKEY = MCDT.CTKEY AND OBDT.OWKEY = MCDT.OWKEY AND OBDT.OBHDKEY = MCDT.OBHDKEY AND OBDT.OBDTKEY = MCDT.OBDTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_MVOB_CNTR MC /*이고 용기 정보*/ ON MCDT.CTKEY = MC.CTKEY AND MCDT.OWKEY = MC.OWKEY AND MCDT.OBHDKEY = MC.OBHDKEY AND MCDT.CNTRBARCODE = MC.CNTRBARCODE WHERE OBHD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OBHD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND MC.CNTRBARCODE = #{cntrbarcode} AND MC.CNTRDDLNYN = 'Y' AND MC.CNFRMYN = 'N' AND OBHD.CNTRWKCOMPLYN = 'Y' GROUP BY OBDT.CTKEY ,OBDT.OWKEY ,OBDT.OBHDKEY ,MC.CNTRBARCODE ,OBDT.OBDTKEY ORDER BY OBDT.OBHDKEY ,MC.CNTRBARCODE ,OBDT.OBDTKEY

/* wms-outbound-obMoveObManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectContainerDetailListByOutboundDetailKey - 이고용기 상세조회 BY 출고 상세 */ SELECT MCDT.CTKEY ,MCDT.OWKEY ,MCDT.OBHDKEY ,MCDT.OBDTKEY ,MCDT.CNTRBARCODE ,MCDT.ICKEY ,MCDT.IVATKEY ,MCDT.UOM ,MCDT.QTY ,OBHD.PIHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_MVOB_CNTR_DT MCDT /*이고 용기 상세 정보*/ INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_MVOB_CNTR MC /*이고 용기 정보*/ ON MCDT.CTKEY = MC.CTKEY AND MCDT.OWKEY = MC.OWKEY AND MCDT.OBHDKEY = MC.OBHDKEY AND MCDT.CNTRBARCODE = MC.CNTRBARCODE INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OBHD ON MC.CTKEY = OBHD.CTKEY AND MC.OWKEY = OBHD.OWKEY AND MC.OBHDKEY = OBHD.OBHDKEY WHERE MCDT.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND MCDT.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND MCDT.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND MCDT.OBDTKEY = #{obdtkey} AND MCDT.CNTRBARCODE = #{cntrbarcode} AND MC.CNTRDDLNYN = 'Y' AND MC.CNFRMYN = 'N' AND OBHD.CNTRWKCOMPLYN = 'Y'
